hero.titleDescription: Handcrafted cookies made with real butter, intense flavors, and a nostalgic touch that melts your heart.

vainilla.name: Vanilla Chips
vainilla.description: Classic vanilla cookie filled with Hershey chocolate chips, covered in chocolate ganache and topped with a white chocolate pearl.

chocolate.name: Intense Chocolate
chocolate.description: For chocolate lovers: an elegant cocoa cookie filled with Hershey chocolate chips, covered in chocolate ganache and dusted with cocoa.

red.name: Red Velvet
red.description: Enjoy eternal Christmas with this innovative Red Velvet cookie filled with cranberries and covered with powdered sugar and cranberries.

marmoleada.name: Marbled
marmoleada.description: Enjoy the best of both worlds: vanilla and cocoa with Hershey chocolate chips and a topping of chocolate ganache and pecans.

matcha.name: Matcha
matcha.description: A cookie with intense flavors, made with matcha and filled with white chocolate and coconut, topped with white chocolate and coconut.

oreo.name: Oreo
oreo.description: A classic bakery flavor, a delicious vanilla cookie with Oreo pieces and topped with a whole Oreo cookie.

pop.name: Pop Caramel
pop.description: A burst of flavor: vanilla cookie with cajeta, filled with dark and white chocolate, topped with royal icing and popcorn.

taro.name: Unicorn Taro
taro.description: The unique taste of taro combined with sliced almonds, topped with royal icing and marshmallows.

reyes.name: Kings
reyes.description: This limited–edition cookie adds an innovative touch to our classic cookie by changing the topping to white chocolate and quince paste.

cafe.name: Coffee
cafe.description: An intense, bold–flavored cookie, ideal for those who love starting their mornings with a coffee kick.

rose.name: Rose
rose.description: Our cookie for love and friendship, made with rose water, filled with almonds, and topped with white chocolate and rose petals.

cafe.name: Coffee Cake
cafe.description: Moist and aromatic cake with a deep coffee flavor, filled and covered with a smooth cream that enhances its toasted notes and fluffy texture.

cocoFrutosRojos.name: Coconut & Red Berries Cake
cocoFrutosRojos.description: Soft coconut cake with fresh red berries, filled with buttercream and topped with cream cheese frosting for a perfect balance of freshness and creaminess.

moka.name: Mocha Cake
moka.description: Fluffy mocha cake with cinnamon notes, filled with Mousseline mousse and topped with cream cheese frosting for a luxurious texture and beautifully balanced flavor.

zanahoria.name: Carrot Cake
zanahoria.description: Moist and spiced carrot cake with toasted nuts, filled and covered with silky cream cheese buttercream that enhances its warm, homemade flavor.

milHojas.name: Mille-Feuille Cake
milHojas.description: Crispy puff pastry layers with smooth vanilla cream, finished with a delicate dusting of powdered sugar for an elegant and irresistible dessert.

redVelvet.name: Red Velvet Cake
redVelvet.description: Fluffy and vibrant Red Velvet with soft notes of cocoa and vanilla, topped and filled with buttercream for a classic, elegant, and irresistible dessert.

malvavisco.name: Marshmallow Cake
malvavisco.description: Soft marshmallow cake with buttercream and crunchy meringues, offering a sweet, fluffy, and visually charming experience in every slice.

sorpresa.name: Surprise Cake
sorpresa.description: Moist and aromatic chocolate cake with a surprise candy center, filled with Bariloche cream and topped with chocolate buttercream for a fun and exquisite experience.

blackAndWhite.name: Black & White Chocolate Cake
blackAndWhite.description: Elegant white and dark chocolate cake, topped with silky ganache and bitter cocoa bites that enhance its sophisticated contrast and deeply balanced flavor.

mazapan.name: Mazapán Cake
mazapan.description: Soft marzipan cake with almond notes, filled and topped with Mousseline cream for a delicate texture and irresistibly sweet elegance.

pinkVelvet.name: Pink Velvet Cake
pinkVelvet.description: Aromatic Pink Velvet with rose petals, filled with soft buttercream and topped with cream cheese frosting for a delicate, floral, and charming dessert.

pistacheAlmendra.name: Pistachio, Almond & Date Cake
pistacheAlmendra.description: Healthy pistachio and almond cake, lightly sweet with cardamom and lemon notes, perfect with chocolate ganache for a nutritious and elegant dessert.

roscaChocolateNuez.name: Chocolate Walnut Ring Cake
roscaChocolateNuez.description: Moist and aromatic chocolate bundt cake with toasted walnuts, perfect on its own or with ganache, offering a balance between crunchy texture and intense flavor.

roscaMarmoleada.name: Marbled Ring Cake
roscaMarmoleada.description: Fluffy marbled bundt cake with vanilla and chocolate swirls, smooth texture and balanced flavor, making it an irresistible and visually charming classic.

roscaNaranja.name: Orange Ring Cake
roscaNaranja.description: Fluffy and aromatic orange bundt cake soaked in citrus syrup that enhances its freshness and juiciness for a bright and delicious classic dessert.

panqueZanahoria.name: Carrot Loaf
panqueZanahoria.description: Soft and aromatic carrot loaf made with cream for a richer, deeper texture, offering a warm, moist, and irresistible flavor.

panqueElote.name: Corn Loaf
panqueElote.description: Creamy and aromatic corn loaf with tender kernels, cream cheese, and a touch of vanilla, resulting in a smooth texture and irresistible traditional flavor.

panquePlatanoAvena.name: Banana Oat Loaf
panquePlatanoAvena.description: Soft and nutritious banana loaf with oats, nuts, and chocolate chips, offering a warm flavor, moist texture, and naturally healthy touch.

flanCalabaza.name: Pumpkin Flan
flanCalabaza.description: Creamy and spiced pumpkin flan with a velvety texture and balanced sweetness, enhanced with cream cheese for an elegant and comforting fall dessert.

flanNapolitano.name: Napolitan Flan
flanNapolitano.description: Ultra-creamy Napolitan flan with cream cheese and vanilla, with a silky texture and balanced sweetness—classic, refined, and always irresistible.

carlotaLimon.name: Lemon Carlota
carlotaLimon.description: Creamy and refreshing lemon Carlota with soft layers and a perfect balance of acidity and sweetness—ideal as a light, cold, irresistible dessert.

carlotaFresa.name: Strawberry Carlota
carlotaFresa.description: Soft and creamy strawberry Carlota with fresh fruity flavor and light layers—perfect as a cold, delicate, and naturally delicious dessert.

pannaCotta.name: Panna Cotta
pannaCotta.description: Soft and silky panna cotta with a delicate vanilla aroma—an elegant, light dessert with a velvety texture and refined flavor.

tartaSableChocolate.name: Sablé Chocolate Tart
tartaSableChocolate.description: Crunchy sablé tart with chocolate topping and Bariloche cream filling, combining textures and intense, sophisticated flavor in every bite.

cremeBrulee.name: Crème Brûlée
cremeBrulee.description: Silky and aromatic crème brûlée with a crunchy layer of caramelized sugar that contrasts perfectly with its creamy, delicately vanilla interior.

miniPavlova.name: Mini Pavlova
miniPavlova.description: Crispy-on-the-outside, soft-on-the-inside pavlova topped with cream, red berries, and chocolate—light, sophisticated, and visually stunning.

muffinPlatanoZanahoriaChocolate.name: Banana, Carrot & Chocolate Muffin
muffinPlatanoZanahoriaChocolate.description: Nutritious banana and carrot muffin made with healthy flours, naturally sweetened, and full of chocolate chips—soft texture and comforting, balanced flavor.

muffinManzanaPlatano.name: Apple Banana Muffin
muffinManzanaPlatano.description: Soft and aromatic apple and banana muffin, lightly sweetened and made with light flours—juicy, spiced, and naturally delicious.

muffinFrambuesaArandanoChocolate.name: Raspberry & Blueberry Chocolate Muffin
muffinFrambuesaArandanoChocolate.description: Juicy muffin with raspberries, blueberries, and chocolate chips, naturally sweetened and made with light flours for a fruity, balanced, delicious bite.

muffinCrezaYogurt.name: Cherry Yogurt Muffin
muffinCrezaYogurt.description: Soft and juicy cherry muffin with Greek yogurt, delicate and fresh flavor—perfect for those who enjoy a fruity touch in every bite.

muffinChocolate.name: Chocolate Muffin
muffinChocolate.description: Intense chocolate muffin—moist, fluffy, and deeply flavorful—turning every bite into a true moment of indulgence.

muffinFresa.name: Strawberry Muffin
muffinFresa.description: Fluffy vanilla muffin with yogurt and fresh strawberries—smooth, balanced flavor, ideal for those seeking a fruity twist in a classic bite.

muffinVainilla.name: Vanilla Muffin
muffinVainilla.description: Soft and fluffy vanilla muffin with delicate aroma and classic flavor—light, versatile, and always irresistible.

tips.sweetnessDesc: Each cake has its own sweetness level so you can choose exactly what you like.
tips.portionsDesc: Portions designed to share and enjoy.
tips.ingredientsDesc: We make each cake with real butter, fresh eggs, and high-quality ingredients. Everything is homemade—no premixes and no shortcuts.
tips.orderDesc: To ensure flavor, texture, and finish, orders must be placed at least 1 day in advance.

contact.title: Cookies for your events
contact.description: We quote special orders for events, corporate gifts, and celebrations. Write to us and let’s create something delicious together.

comingSoon.comingDesc: Very soon you’ll find here a new experience crafted with great attention to detail.
